<!-- GENERATED by docs_gen.py from the source of truth (araclean + GLOSSARY.md). Do not edit by hand; run `uv run python docs_gen.py`. -->

# Glossary

araclean uses **Arabic-primary terminology** (ADR-0007): the canonical name of each Arabic-script entity is its established transliteration, glossed to English here and shown as a hover tooltip wherever it appears in these docs.

| Term | Arabic | English / technical |
|------|--------|---------------------|
| Tashkeel | تشكيل | Diacritics / vocalization marks |
| Harakat (sing. haraka) | حركات | Short vowels |
| Fatha / Damma / Kasra / Sukun | فتحة/ضمة/كسرة/سكون | the short-vowel marks / vowelless mark |
| Tanween | تنوين | Nunation |
| Shadda | شدّة | Gemination / consonant-doubling mark |
| Madda | مدّة | Madda sign (hamza + long alef) |
| Dagger alef | ألف خنجرية | Superscript alef (marks an unwritten long alef) |
| Qur'anic annotation marks | علامات قرآنية | Qur'anic recitation/annotation signs (+ extended marks) |
| Tatweel | تطويل | Elongation / justification character (kashida) |
| Hamza | همزة | Glottal-stop letter/mark |
| Alef | ألف | The letter alef |
| Alef variants | — | Alef with hamza above/below, madda, wasla, wavy hamza |
| Alef maqsura | ألف مقصورة | Shortened/curtailed alef (dotless yeh form) |
| Teh marbuta | تاء مربوطة | "Tied" taa (word-final) |
| Waw | واو | The letter waw; also the conjunction "and" |
| Yeh | ياء | The letter yeh/yaa |
| Kaf | كاف | The letter kaf |
| Heh | هاء | The letter heh |
| Lam-alef | لام ألف | The lam+alef sequence and its ligature |
| Arabic-Indic digits | أرقام عربية-هندية | Eastern Arabic numerals |
| Extended Arabic-Indic digits | أرقام فارسية/أردية | Persian/Urdu numerals |
| Dediacritization | إزالة التشكيل | Removing tashkeel |
